title: Temperature is Breaking Your Pipeline
description: High temperature makes the model add text around JSON. Fix the parser to handle it.
problem: Your parser gets this from the model: 'Sure! Here is the JSON:\n{"intent": "refund"}\nLet me know if you need anything else!'. json.loads() crashes. Write parse_response(text) that extracts and returns the JSON dict regardless of surrounding text.
starter_code:
import json

def parse_response(text):
    # Extract JSON from text that may have prose before/after it
    return json.loads(text)  # fix this
hint: Find the first '{' and last '}' in the string, slice between them, then json.loads().

test_cases.label: Prose before and after
test_cases.call: parse_response('Here you go: {"ok": true} Hope that helps!')
